svg.metadata:
{"type":"flowgraph","mermaid":"graph TD
 A[Application Code] --> B[RetoldDataService]
 B --> C[Orator + Restify]
 B --> D[Meadow DAL]
 B --> E[MeadowEndpoints]
 D --> F[FoxHound Query DSL]
 D --> G[Storage Provider]
 G --> H[MySQL]
 G --> I[SQLite]
 G --> J[MSSQL]
 G --> K[PostgreSQL]
 G --> L[MongoDB]
 E --> M[REST Routes]
 E --> N[Behavior Injection]
","style":"notebook"}
